details.productUrlName: Beholders Fear Ray Drown in the Loch Rainbow Foil

customAttributes.description:
Dungeons & Dragons: Death is in the Eyes of the Beholder I

Choose one —
• Counter target spell with converted mana cost less than or equal to the number of cards in its controller's graveyard.
• Destroy target creature with converted mana costs less than or equal to the number of cards in its controller's graveyard.
customAttributes.flavorText: “On a failed save, target creature becomes frightened.”
